accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context; the rule was published Nov. 18, 2024 (89 Fed. Reg. 91094) and the resolution disapproves it under chapter 8 of title 5.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details either appear in the bill text or are accurate context (CRA, EPA administering the WEC rule).

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution's purpose is to nullify the specified EPA waste emissions charge rule via congressional disapproval.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains that the disapproval renders the EPA rule with no force or effect, preventing its implementation or enforcement.

exceptions_conditions.why: This one-sentence disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes House passage Feb. 26, Senate passage Feb. 27, and approval/enactment on March 14, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: Congress disapproves the rule and it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized, internally consistent, and clearly written.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding, though it accurately restates the rule title and dates.

correct_entities.why: EPA, the rule title, the Federal Register citation, and chapter 8 of title 5 are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register publication date and all passage/approval dates are stated correctly.
